meta.title: Khorasan Herat | Home
meta.description: A corporate home page for Khorasan Herat with a redesigned header, footer, and blue middle showcase.

brand.name: Khorasan Herat
brand.tagline: A professional presentation of the company, its services, and its internal sections

hero.eyebrow: Corporate, multilingual, and aligned with the visual reference
hero.title: Khorasan Herat Advantages
hero.description: Explore factory sections and key purchase advantages offered by Khorasan Herat.

items.title: Credit Sales Unit
items.description: Flexible credit-based purchasing for returning customers with fast financial coordination.
items.alt: View of the sales and consultation unit at Khorasan Herat

items.title: Warranty and Quality Control
items.description: Product authenticity, quality assurance, and detailed review before dispatch.
items.alt: View of the warehouse and quality control process

items.title: Fast Proforma Issuance
items.description: Quick quotation and proforma generation for buyers and business partners.
items.alt: View of the office process for fast proforma issuance

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Continuous support, order follow-up, and guidance throughout the purchase journey.
items.alt: View of the customer support team at Khorasan Herat

items.title: An organized two-row header
items.text: The main navigation, search field, phone callout, and language switcher were redesigned to better match the supplied reference.

items.title: Replaceable image cards
items.text: Each middle card now contains a clean placeholder image so you can swap in real company photos later without changing the layout.

items.title: A unified #36f color system
items.text: Buttons, backgrounds, shadows, and interface accents now follow the new primary blue consistently across the page.

about.title: A page now ready for real corporate content
about.description: This layout is now structured for future company pages, services, project showcases, team introductions, and real imagery. Swapping copy and photos later will stay straightforward.

footer.aboutText: Khorasan Herat now includes a multi-column footer, quick links, direct contact blocks, and a closing CTA so the overall presentation feels closer to the provided reference and more ready for expansion.
footer.address: Herat, Industrial Zone, Khorasan Herat Head Office
footer.rights: All rights for this version are reserved for Khorasan Herat
